name: AI Behavior Issue
description: Report incorrect AI voice agent behavior
title: "[AI] "
labels: ["ai"]

body:
  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Conversation Example

  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Expected AI Response

  - type: textarea

      label: Actual AI Response

  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Business Context
